author: Viktor J.
title: A lot of bugs
content: When scrolling a song may skip next one and jump over to the second next, scroll is not precise. When on a single repeat may jump to start before the end. Turning EQ on/off sound disappears for a moment. Some ads does not have close or any other button to close it.

author: Spaceowel
title: It’s great except
content: It’s great except if i edit audio tags, the song won’t play
